description_short: Threat hunting across loaded PCAP data with ICS awareness.
description_long: Comprehensive threat hunting toolkit for parsed PCAP data. Includes top talker analysis, port classification with ICS/suspicious knowledge bases, C2 beaconing detection via inter-arrival time jitter analysis, DNS anomaly detection (DGA via Shannon entropy, tunneling indicators), TLS fingerprinting, lateral movement detection (management ports, port scans, ICS cross-zone), and data exfiltration indicators (asymmetric flows, DNS exfil). All tools operate on the in-memory PcapSession without LLM dependency.
author: Event Mill Contributors
